backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a student placement portal with companies, job postings, student profiles, and applications; includes authorization mixins and access control for admin/user roles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old health recommendation actor state into new placement portal state with companies, jobs, students, and applications.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four main features: portal replacement, student dashboard, job application flow, and admin panel with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend components including dashboard, job cards, admin panels, profile management, and authentication hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color palette defining light and dark mode CSS variables for the placement portal theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference; title still references old health recommendation system.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app root with TanStack Router setup defining routes for dashboard, job details, application flow, admin panel, and profile pages with QueryClient provider.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied component displaying error message and return-to-dashboard button for unauthorized admin page access attempts.
frontend/src/components/admin/Applicatio: Admin interface for viewing and managing student job applications with status updates; currently shows placeholder content until students apply.
frontend/src/components/admin/CompanyMan: React component for managing companies with a table view and dialog form to add new companies (name, industry, location). Uses custom hooks for fetching and adding companies with loading states and skeleton UI.
frontend/src/components/admin/JobPosting: React component for creating and managing job postings with a dialog form that includes company selection, job details, skills/branches management with tags, salary range, and logo URL. Uses custom hooks for companies and job postings data.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationHisto: Card component displaying job application details including company name, job title, submission date, and color-coded status badge.
frontend/src/components/EligibilityCheck: Displays a card showing whether a student meets job eligibility requirements (CGPA, branch, skills) with visual indicators and detailed breakdowns.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a footer with copyright information, a link to caffeine.ai, and a disclaimer about placement decisions.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header with logo, authentication status, and navigation buttons for dashboard, profile, and admin (role-based).
frontend/src/components/JobCard.tsx: Displays a job posting card with company info, salary range, eligibility badge, and required skills; navigates to job details on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication with login/logout functionality and loading states, clearing query cache on logout.
Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and a gradient background container.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCompletio: Shows a progress bar and checklist indicating which profile fields are complete, encouraging users to fill missing information.
frontend/src/components/StudentProfileCa: Displays student profile information including name, email, CGPA, branch, skills, bio, and resume link with an edit button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, handling authentication with Internet Identity and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminOperations.ts: Provides mutation hooks for admin operations: adding companies, adding job postings, and updating application status. Each mutation invalidates relevant queries and shows toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle. Provides login/logout functions and various status flags for UI state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useJobApplication.ts: Custom mutation hook for students to apply for jobs by job ID. Invalidates applied jobs and job application queries on success and displays toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching data: caller user role, companies, job postings, applied jobs, and specific job applications. All queries are enabled only when actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudentDashboard.t: Combines student profile, job postings, and applications data to filter jobs based on student eligibility (CGPA and branch requirements). Returns filtered eligible jobs and loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudentProfile.ts: Custom React hook that manages student profile data with queries and mutations for creating/updating profiles, calculating profile completion percentage, and handling toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color palettes (navy, teal, gold) and utility classes including a grid pattern background.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with role-based access control displaying three tabs for managing companies, job postings, and applications.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFlow.tsx: Multi-step job application page that checks student eligibility (GPA and branch requirements), handles application submission, and displays success confirmation with next steps.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetails.tsx: Job posting detail view showing company information, job requirements, salary, location, and eligibility status with apply/applied state management.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileEdit.tsx: Profile editing form allowing students to update personal information, CGPA, branches, skills (with tag management), resume link, and bio with completion indicator.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: React component for creating student profiles with form inputs for name, email, CGPA, branches, skills, resume link, and bio. Includes tag-based input for branches and skills with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx: Main student dashboard page that displays profile card, filterable job listings with search and CTC filters, and application history. Handles authentication checks and redirects to profile setup if needed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking PlacementPro's features, requirements, and architectural state. Documents six implemented features including student portal transformation, dashboard, job application flow, admin view, UI design, and profile management.
